free_text: Partial proton widths of isobaric analogue states in
The 3 MV Van de Graaff generator was
used.
The proton current was 300 nA.
The target material, BaCl2 enriched in Cl-37 to 99%,
was evaporated onto 10 mu-g/cm2 carbon foils. The
optimal target thickness was about 5 mu-g/cm2. The
stochiometric composition of the BaCl2 target as
measured from the relative intensities of the Ba and
Cl elastic scattering peaks was found to remain
unchanged during the experiment.
Energy digitizing error
Data digitizing error
COMMON section and REACTION code in
Sub 006 were changed.
Reaction products were detected with silicon
surface-barrier counters. The solid angles were
defined by circular aluminium diaphragms of 7.0 mm
diam at a distance of 7.8 cm from the target.
